
user@host /tmp % agy --dangerously-skip-permissions

      ▄▀▀▄        Antigravity CLI 1.0.4
     ▀▀▀▀▀▀       USER@example.com
    ▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀      Gemini 3.5 Flash (Medium)
   ▄▀▀    ▀▀▄     /tmp
  ▄▀▀      ▀▀▄

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
> In exactly 3 short bullet points, what is tmux?

▸ Thought for 2s, 264 tokens
  Defining Tmux Simply
  Here is what tmux is:

  • Terminal Multiplexer: It allows you to create, switch between, and manage multiple terminal sessions from a single screen.
  • Session Persistence: You can detach from active sessions and reattach to them later, keeping your running background processes alive even if you disconnect from SSH.
  • Window & Pane Management: It lets you split your terminal display into multiple horizontal and vertical panes, allowing you to run and view several commands side-by-side.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
